CLERK REJECT LETTER DEAR MR. JUNIOR AND MR. BRUNELL, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULES 1.31, 2.100, AND 2.111, PLEASE BE ADVISED THAT ANY REQUEST TO TERMINATE OR DISMISS A CASE AND/OR RESTRAINING ORDER MUST BE SUBMITTED ON THE APPROPRIATE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. AT THIS TIME, NO ACTION CAN BE TAKEN ON YOUR REQUEST WITHOUT A PROPER FILING. YOU MUST COMPLETE AND FILE THE APPLICABLE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM (E.G., FORM DV-300). IF YOU ARE UNSURE WHICH FORM IS APPROPRIATE FOR YOU
